steps.title: Identify the verb form requirement
steps.content: The sentence contains “Indonesia is required _____ other Interpol countries with access to its law enforcement databases.” The passive verb phrase is required indicates we need to identify the right verb form.

steps.title: Apply the infinitive rule
steps.content:
Constructions with “required” take infinitive verb forms (to + base verb). “To provide” is the only infinitive in the choices, creating “Indonesia is required to provide other Interpol countries with access to its law enforcement databases.” Choices A (past participle), C (gerund), and D (finite verb) are wrong verb forms.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
